mnemonics: DASH Delivery: Dashboards, Ad-hoc queries, Standard reports, and Hyper-automation are key information delivery methods.
keyPoints: Information delivery provides users with access to analyzed data to support decision-making.
Common delivery methods include dashboards, standard reports, and ad-hoc query tools.
The goal is to deliver the right information to the right user in the right format at the right time.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on technical delivery without considering user needs and business context.
Providing raw data instead of analyzed, actionable information.
Overloading users with too many reports or complex dashboards that hinder rather than help.
